title: APPRENTICESHIP PROGRAMS - 211info
text: WORKSOURCE DOUGLAS APPRENTICESHIP PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides employment and training services, career counseling, and skill upgrade courses. Also provides apprentiiceship and internship opportunities in the Early Childhood Education (CCE), Certified Clinical Medical Assistant (CCMA), and Surgical Technologist fields. 846 SE Pine Street Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (844) 532-6893 9 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Person (844) 532-6893 ext 9 Laura Pumphrey [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Douglas County Services: Job Finding Assistance Job Training Formats Occupation Specific Job Training Prejob Guidance If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WORKSOURCE DOUGLAS
